item.name: Goten Pipe
item.description: An otherworldly flute that, when played, summons the armored Mado steed, Goten.

mount.name: Goten
mount.action: Summon forth Goten. A man-made aberration from a land that exists only in whispers. Its name is said to mean “roaring heavens.”
mount.description: This otherworldly mount, cobbled together from the carcasses of noble beasts and armored in elaborate gold plate, is said only to accept as riders those who have proven their might and mettle on the fields of battle.
mount.tooltip:
The horse is merciful
and generous in victory.
- Golden Uma Doshin
